title: Invasion of Sriluur

{{Quote|Abomination! Death to infidels!|Yuuzhan Vong invaders|<ref name="LCaL" />}}
In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders '''invaded''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].<ref name="TNJOS" />

==Prelude==
When the Yuuzhan Vong War erupted, it was not long before [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] were [[Skirmish above Sriluur|spotted]] near Sriluur,<ref name="AoC:JE">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref> in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]].<ref name="TEA" /> This led to a mass exodus of people who feared an imminent invasion of the planet. Many [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] clans chose to stay behind and form militias to fight for their world. The Yuuzhan Vong-aligned [[Peace Brigade]] infiltrated Sriluur, harassing its inhabitants and attempting to clear the world of technology in preparation for the Yuuzhan Vong invasion.<ref name="LCaL" />

==The invasion==
When the Yuuzhan Vong finally began, a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] encountered the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] member [[Falloon]] while they were trying to leave the planet. They agreed to help him and his droid [[9T-LOM]] to reach his ship and escape the planet together. They fought Peace Brigade goons and [[Chazrach]] in the streets of [[Meirm City]] to find the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] already invaded by [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong warriors]]. After a [[lightfight]], they managed to get on Falloon's [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]], the ''[[Gilded Thranta]]''. As they entered the upper [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], the ship was attacked by [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]. Fortunately for the spacers, the ''Gilded Thranta'' was modified with powerful weaponry and was able to resist the fighters assault until they entered [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="LCaL" />

Elsewhere on Sriluur, the low defense put up by the natives was quickly overrun. The entire planet was conquered in a matter of days, and its inhabitants were enslaved to serve the occupation force.<ref name="TNJOS" /> Many fleeing [[Transport/Legends|transports]] were destroyed above the planet.<ref name="LCaL" />

==Aftermath==
Following the conquest of Sriluur and the Si'Klaata Cluster, the Yuuzhan Vong began the invasion of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] with an [[Attack on the Cyborrea system|attack]] on the [[Cyborrea system/Legends|Cyborrea system]].<ref name="TEA" />

Even though their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] by the occupants, the Weequay adapted and continued to live on Sriluur after the war ended.<ref name="TEA" />

Falloon and the spacers left Sriluur to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He later revealed to them he was in fact the chief accountant for the Black Sun in this [[Tharin sector/Legends|sector]] and his droid contained centuries' worth of financial records of the criminal organization.<ref name="LCaL" />
